tasks.cov: deno test -A --coverage=cov_profile && deno coverage cov_profile --lcov '--exclude=(tests|scripts)/' --output=cov.lcov && deno run --allow-read scripts/check-coverage.ts cov.lcov 95
tasks.check: deno check mod.ts src/*.ts tests/*.ts scripts/*.ts zuke.ts
tasks.ci: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno task spell && deno task check && deno task cov
